positive: A minimalist, geometric line art design featuring a celestial map (constellations, moons, planets) arranged within a single circular frame. The style should be clean, abstract, and suitable for etching or woodcut print. Black ink on a cream background, single continuous line work.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, gradients, realism, excessive color
